scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --workspace backend" "npm run dev --workspace frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace backend && npm run build --workspace frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace backend && npm run typecheck --workspace frontend
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run build && npm run test:smoke
scripts.setup:db: npm run db:up && npm run prisma:migrate && npm run db:seed
